title: CBOR tag 261 — Network Address Prefix (IPv4 or IPv6 Address + Mask Length)…
summary:
CBOR tag 261 (data item: map (IPAddress + Mask Length)): Network Address Prefix (IPv4 or IPv6 Address + Mask Length) (DEPRECATED in favor of 52 and 54
